name: Access your data for sites in the chatgpt.com domain
description: Required to access the ChatGPT website using the web interface.

name: See your mail accounts, their identities and their folders
description: Necessary to choose the correct mail identity when replying to an email.

name: Read and modify your email messages as you compose and send them
description: Required to create a new email message or substitute the text the user has highlighted.

name: Download files and read and modify the browser's download history
description: Needed for downloading the custom prompts export.

name: Read and modify your email messages as they are displayed to you
description: Required to create a new email message or substitute the text the user has highlighted.

name: Read your email messages
description: Required to create a new email message or substitute the text the user has highlighted.

name: Access browser tabs
description: Required to create a new email message or substitute the text the user has highlighted.

name: List message tags
description: Required to use the tags related data placeholders and check if the tags received from the API are new or they have to be created, when using the "Add tags" option.

name: Create, modify and delete message tags
description: Required to create new tags when using the "Add tags" option.

name: Change properties and tags of your email messages
description: Required to assign tags to an email message when using the "Add tags" option.

name: Move, copy, or delete your email messages
description: Required to move spam messages to the spam folder, if the automatic spam filter is enabled.

name: Access your data for all websites
description: Granting this permission prevents any CORS issues with Ollama or some OpenAI Compatible APIs. It can be enabled via the corresponding button on the options page.

name: Access your data for sites in the anthropic.com domain
description: Granting this permission prevents any CORS issues with the Claude API. It can be enabled via the corresponding button on the options page.

name: Access your data for all websites
description: Required to access the ChatGPT website using the web interface.
note: This permission was added at the first stages of development and never fixed.

name: Display notifications to you
description: The add-on shows a notification if you're trying to use the ChatGPT API integration, but the API key or model are invalid. In such cases, falls back to the web interface, showing a notification with the error.
note: In version 2.1.0 the fallback to the ChatGPT web interface was removed.
